addOnlyTooltip: Once a property is created, entity types cannot be removed
advancedOptions.qualifiedNameDisabledToo: Once a property is created, Qualified Name cannot be changed
advancedOptions.qualifiedNameTooltip: Optionally provide a dot-separated fully qualified name for this property. This name serves as an ID, and must be unique across properties
advancedOptions.title: Advanced Options
allowedEntityTypes.anyTooltip: Any entity type will be accepted as a value
allowedEntityTypes.title: Allowed Entity Types
allowedEntityTypes.tooltip: Choose the types of entities that are allowed as values for this property
allowedValues.addTooltip: Add a new value to the allowed list
allowedValues.editExistingTooltip: Editing existing allowed values is not permitted
allowedValues.fieldTooltip: Define the set of valid values for this property. If none are provided, any value will be allowed
allowedValues.removeTooltip: Remove from the allowed values list
allowedValues.title: Allowed Values
appliesTo.error: Please select asset types this applies to
appliesTo.title: Applies to
appliesTo.tooltip: Select the types of entities that this property can be added to
create.propertyTypeDisabledTooltip: Once a property is created, its type cannot be changed
create.propertyTypeTooltip: The allowed value type of the property
display.hidePropertyTooltip: If enabled, this property will be hidden everywhere
display.hideWhenEmptyTooltip: If enabled, this property will only show in the asset sidebar if it's assigned to the asset
display.replaceBadgeConfirmation: Another property <pill>{{name}}</pill> is already being shown on asset previews, but only one property is allowed at a time. Do you want to replace the current property? This will hide {{name}} on all asset previews.
display.showAsAssetBadgeDisabledTooltip: Only Text or Number property types with allowed values defined can appear as an asset badge.
display.showAsAssetBadgeTooltip: If enabled, this property will appear as asset badge
display.showInAssetSidebarTooltip: If enabled, this property will appear in asset sidebar
display.showInColumnsTableDisabledToolti: Property must apply to Columns in order to show in columns table.
display.showInColumnsTableTooltip: If enabled, this property will appear as a column in the Columns table for Datasets
display.showInSearchFiltersTooltip: If enabled, this property will appear in search filters
display.title: Display Preferences
page.subtitle: Create and manage custom properties for your data assets
page.title: Structured Properties
permissionTooltip: Must have permission to manage structured properties. Ask your DataHub administrator.
table.confirmDeleteText: Are you sure you want to delete? Deleting will remove this structured property from all assets it's currently on.
valueType.entityDescription: A reference to a DataHub asset
valueType.entityListDescription: A reference to a list of DataHub assets
valueType.numberListDescription: A list of integers or decimals
valueType.richTextDescription: A freeform string of markdown text
